title: Brookvin
review: I'm not a wine guy but I liked what I had here, the vibe was really nice but this place really shines with the excellent staff. Everyone there is so friendly, they'll remember your name, it's a great place to go to as a local and get to know the staff.

title: 7th Ave Donuts
review: It's a friendly local diner, cash only nothing crazy.

title: American Cheese
review: Awesome dive-y bar with good pizza. Most "pizza bars" have passable slices but American Cheez put a bit more effort/thought into it. The bartenders are super friendly, nothing glamorous but a great place to land during a night out.
